title: Dramatic Link Ate A Potato
description:
The very sad story of a singer who loved potatoes.. 

THE SONG DURING THE EPIC EYE BROW IN BOTTLE SCENE IS CALLED "Gentle Breeze" FROM "Trauma Center"!!!


Traslation of the song by QuintusCunctator:

"I think every day is like a miraculous fishing..."
